channel.title: Cell Phone on PCB Isolation
channel.description: Recent content in Cell Phone on PCB Isolation

item.title: Motorola Razr V3: Real vs Counterfeit Teardown
item.description:
Left- Authentic Razr V3, Right - Counterfeit Razr V3

I recently bought a Razr V3 on eBay. The listing below shows that it is made by Motorola. The pictures are of an authentic Razr. However I received a counterfeit Razr.

PS - I wrote a quick guide on spotting counterfeit Motorola Razr V3’s (without disassembly).

If the phone would have worked, I wouldn’t have cared. But it wouldn’t get a signal with my SIM, so I complained and got a refund.
